title: Frontend UI Framework Selection
context: The application requires a cohesive, modern, and rapidly developable UI that aligns with a fantasy/clean aesthetic. We must select a framework that provides high utility and maintainability.
decision: We will use Tailwind CSS in combination with shadcn/ui components for all frontend styling and component structure.

positive: Guarantees compliance with technical constraint CON-002
negative: Requires our UI components to conform to the shadcn/ui headless philosophy
